# Stellar Voice Agents

> AI voice agents that engage, qualify, and book appointments 24/7. Built for businesses where slow follow-up loses revenue — Real Estate, Health, Finance, Trades, and any team running ads or fielding inbound calls.

Stellar Voice Agents replaces slow, inconsistent, human-bottlenecked lead handling with AI voice agents that sound human, respond instantly, and qualify and book around the clock. The brand voice is direct, outcome-driven, no hype, no hedging.

## Products

- **AI Receptionist** ($597/mo starting): Answers every incoming call in under 1 second. Qualifies callers, books appointments, sends call summaries. Two agents per base package — one for calls, one for SMS.
- **ClosedLoop** ($10/lead starting): Instant lead response. The moment someone responds to an ad or fills out a form, we call them — beats every competitor to the phone, qualifies, and books before they shop around.
- **Dead Lead Revival** ($10/lead starting): We work your aged-lead database, identify who's ready to move now, and put re-activated prospects back on your calendar.

All plans include free white-glove agent setup with a 3-month commitment, 14-day pilot, and cancel anytime.

## Industries served

Real Estate · Healthcare · Finance & Insurance · Solar · Trades & Home Services · Legal · Landscaping · Auto · Any lead-driven business where speed-to-lead matters.

## Founders

- **Gary Sarco** — CEO & Founder. Background in cybersecurity, IT operations, and 6 years in real estate. Built Stellar after watching leads slip through the cracks because nobody picked up fast enough.
- **David Taylor** — Co-Founder & CTO. Co-founder of AI to the World. Runs the technical engine — voice agents that sound human, integrate with any CRM, and stay live at scale.

## Key signals & metrics

- 3× speed-to-lead vs human follow-up
- +120% qualified-lead volume from AI screening
- +45% additional leads captured outside business hours
- +25% conversion lift from natural-sounding voice vs robotic IVR
- +67% appointment lift from analyzing call transcripts
